notes: Fixes Newznab/OMGWTF browsing by using supported search APIs and clearer XML error handling.
Fixes Usenet playback selecting the wrong cached stream by uploading each NZB to AltMount with a unique filename.
Accepts AltMount keys or Stremio manifest URLs in the Newsgroups setup screen.
Routes Pi 5 HDMI audio correctly for video playback, PC Link, and Game Center while keeping composite defaults unchanged.
